columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key of the table

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the start date of the corresponding task

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the end date of the corresponding task

columns.Name: AWARD_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column indicates type of award associated with task

columns.Name: AWARD
columns.Comments: This column indicates award associated with task

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column indicates status of the task

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: This column indicates whether the task is active or not

columns.Name: IS_IMAGE
columns.Comments: This column indicates whether the task is associated with a image or not

columns.Name: ORDER_RANK
columns.Comments: This column stores the rank of the task

columns.Name: PUBLISH_START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates wellness  tasks publish start date.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates wellness  tasks publish end date.

columns.Name: TASK_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: This column for extra task attribute

columns.Name: TASK_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: This column for extra task attribute

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ARCHIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the archival date of the corresponding task

columns.Name: IMAGE
columns.Comments: This column stores the image for the current task
